content:
🚀 babysitter | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a framework for building and managing reliable, auditable, and controlled AI agent workflows, ensuring they execute tasks precisely as defined and preventing unintended or erroneous actions.
✨ Key Features: • Enforces obedience on agentic workforces • Manages complex tasks and workflows • Deterministic, hallucination-free self-orchestration
📖 Summary: Babysitter is a JavaScript library designed to enforce strict obedience and deterministic execution within AI agent workforces. It enables the management of complex tasks and workflows by ensuring agents follow predefined steps, pass quality gates, and undergo human approval when necessary, all while maintaining an immutable record of decisions.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
